mapper.sql:
AND p.del_yn = 'N'
AND p.board_gbn_cd = #{boardGbnCd}
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_no, p.board_gbn_cd, p.member_no, p.title, p.view_cnt, p.like_cnt, p.dislike_cnt, p.comment_cnt, p.del_yn, p.create_ts, p.update_ts, COALESCE(m.nickname, IF(p.member_no = 0, (SELECT admin_id FROM ADM_LOGIN_INFO LIMIT 1), NULL)) AS nickname FROM BRD_POST_MST p LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY p.post_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_MST p WHERE 1=1

SELECT p.post_no, p.board_gbn_cd, p.member_no, p.title, p.content, p.view_cnt, p.like_cnt, p.dislike_cnt, p.comment_cnt, p.del_yn, p.create_ts, p.update_ts, COALESCE(m.nickname, IF(p.member_no = 0, (SELECT admin_id FROM ADM_LOGIN_INFO LIMIT 1), NULL)) AS nickname FROM BRD_POST_MST p LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no WHERE p.post_no = #{postNo} AND p.del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BRD_POST_MST (board_gbn_cd, member_no, title, content, view_cnt, like_cnt, dislike_cnt, comment_cnt, reg_ip, approval_yn, del_yn) VALUES (#{boardGbnCd}, #{memberNo}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{regIp}, 'N', 'N')
mapper.update: UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, update_ts = NOW() WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND member_no = #{memberNo} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_no, c.post_no, c.parent_comment_no, c.depth, c.member_no, c.content, c.like_cnt, c.dislike_cnt, c.del_yn, c.create_ts, c.update_ts, m.nickname FROM BRD_POST_COMMENT c JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = c.member_no WHERE c.post_no = #{postNo} AND c.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY COALESCE(c.parent_comment_no, c.comment_no), c.comment_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BRD_POST_COMMENT (post_no, parent_comment_no, depth, member_no, content, like_cnt, dislike_cnt, reg_ip, approval_yn, del_yn) VALUES (#{postNo}, #{parentCommentNo}, #{depth}, #{memberNo}, #{content}, 0, 0, #{regIp}, 'N', 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT reaction_typ_cd FROM BRD_POST_REACTION WHERE post_typ_cd = '1' AND post_no = #{postNo} AND comment_no = 0 AND member_no = #{memberNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BRD_POST_REACTION (post_typ_cd, post_no, comment_no, member_no, reaction_typ_cd) VALUES ('1', #{postNo}, 0, #{memberNo}, #{reactionTypCd}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reaction_typ_cd = #{reactionTypCd}
mapper.select: SELECT reaction_typ_cd FROM BRD_POST_REACTION WHERE post_typ_cd = '2' AND comment_no = #{commentNo} AND post_no = 0 AND member_no = #{memberNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.comment_no AS commentNo, r.reaction_typ_cd AS reactionTypCd FROM BRD_POST_REACTION r JOIN BRD_POST_COMMENT c ON c.comment_no = r.comment_no WHERE r.post_typ_cd = '2' AND r.post_no = 0 AND c.post_no = #{postNo} AND r.member_no = #{memberNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BRD_POST_REACTION (post_typ_cd, post_no, comment_no, member_no, reaction_typ_cd) VALUES ('2', 0, #{commentNo}, #{memberNo}, #{reactionTypCd}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reaction_typ_cd = #{reactionTypCd}
